_note: Per-page regenerate commands run by observe-server: POST /api/regen?page=<file>. Each page regenerates ITSELF from its source. kind=instant -> deterministic script (fast). kind=agent -> page-specific `claude -p` (requires the claude CLI; spends API, ~minutes; reload when done). kind=manual/live -> no auto-regen. Edit per project; for a built app, point these at that project's generators.

documentation.html.cmd: claude -p 'Regenerate docs/documentation.html as the full, organized product description from docs/PRD.md + 04-spec/spec.md + 01-intake/PRD-ENHANCED.md, using the style of templates/template-docs-page.html. No change logs. Overwrite the file.'

prd.html.cmd: claude -p 'Regenerate docs/prd.html from docs/PRD.md using templates/template-docs-page.html (top nav + left sidebar TOC + sections). Overwrite the file.'

prd-enhanced.html.cmd: claude -p 'Regenerate docs/prd-enhanced.html from 01-intake/PRD-ENHANCED.md using templates/template-docs-page.html. Keep the Business/Functional/Technical pyramid, per-requirement change history, the issue-aligned Change Log (GitHub issue links), traceability matrix, and id map. Overwrite the file.'

users.html.cmd: claude -p 'Regenerate docs/users.html from docs/PRD.md: all user personas + detailed workflows with diagrams + workflow-to-golden-test mapping, using templates/template-docs-page.html. Overwrite the file.'

eval.html.cmd: claude -p 'Regenerate docs/eval.html from .forge/EVAL/, .forge/P6_EXIT.json and 04-spec/spec.md using templates/template-docs-page.html. Render current ship-gate assertions faithfully (no fabricated results). Overwrite the file.'

architecture.html.note: Large diagram-curated reference — regenerate via /forge or the diagram workflow, not a one-shot prompt.

observatory.html.note: Live dashboard — auto-polls observe-server, no regeneration needed.
